title: RSA Encryption, Signatures, and Safe Migration · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent team receives different assets, adversaries, data sizes, cryptoperiods, interoperability duties, availability limits, and compliance claims and transfers rsa encryption, signatures, and safe migration into a new RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of RSA-OAEP and RSA-PSS boundary adapter with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debu…
objectives: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.
Use RSA-OAEP only for bounded key material with matching hash and label context and uniform decryption failure.
Hash exact canonical bytes and use RSA-PSS with explicit hash and salt policy for new RSA signatures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab cryptographic engineering team handles case 3287 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate RSA on trusted keys, OAEP or PSS purpose, payload limits, and uniform failure; record key custody, terminal failure, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk ownership; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or parse supported RSA keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for generate or parse supported rsa keys with minimum strength, valid public exponent, purpose, provenance, and bounded encodings. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation, keep Crypto Go Rsa Key Validation connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
